command:
import os
from PIL import Image

desktop = os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), 'Desktop')
img_path = os.path.join(desktop, 'restaurant_banner_v3.png')

if os.path.exists(img_path):
    size_bytes = os.path.getsize(img_path)
    size_kb = size_bytes / 1024
    size_mb = size_kb / 1024
    print(f'File exists: YES')
    print(f'Path: {img_path}')
    print(f'Size: {size_bytes} bytes ({size_kb:.1f} KB / {size_mb:.2f} MB)')
    try:
        img = Image.open(img_path)
        print(f'Dimensions: {img.width}x{img.height} pixels')
        print(f'Format: {img.format}')
        print(f'Mode: {img.mode}')
        img.close()
    except Exception as e:
        print(f'PIL check failed: {e}')
        print('Using alternative check...')
        import struct
        with open(img_path, 'rb') as f:
            header = f.read(24)
            if header[:8] == b'\x89PNG\r\n\x1a\n':
                w, h = struct.unpack('>II', header[16:24])
                print(f'Dimensions (from header): {w}x{h} pixels')
                print(f'Format: PNG (confirmed)')
else:
    print(f'ERROR: File not found at {img_path}')
description: التحقق من الصورة المُنشأة - الحجم والأبعاد والصيغة
